MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Ronald Arias, Esq. of Wright, Finlay & Zak, LLP, (415-230-4350), for Seterus, Inc., APPEARING THROUGH COURT CALL for Defendants and moving parties.
No appearance by Plaintiff and opposing party.

Off Calendar Nov-12-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Adrian L. Canzoneri, Esq. of ReedSmith, (415-659-4744), for Bank of America and Federal National Mortgage Association, Defendants and moving parties.
No appearance by Plaintiff and opposing party.

Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTs BANK OF AMERICA, N.A., and FEDERAL NATIONAL MORTGAGE ASSOCIATION DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED (1) with 10 day LEAVE TO AMEND to address all issues raised by demurrer regarding causes of action alleged as to Bank of America; (2) without leave to amend as to Federal National Mortgage Association. Order is signed in open court. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)

Defendnat Seterus, Inc'S Demurrer To Complaint
Off Calendar Nov-12-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Nicole S. Dunn, Esq. of Wright Finlay & Zak, (949-477-5050), APPEARING THROUGH COURT CALL for Seterus, Defendant and moving party.
No appearance by Plaintiff and opposing party.

Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: Defendant Seterus, Inc'S Demurrer To Complaint is SUSTAINED with 10 day leave to amend to address all issues raised by demurer regarding causes of action alleged as to Seterus, Inc. Plaintiff's untimely opposition is stricken. Prevailing party to prepare order approved as to form. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-05-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT SETERUS, INC.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is transferred to Department 501, the Real Property Court, to be heard on the same date and time. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

Defendnat Seterus, Inc'S Demurrer To Complaint
Off Calendar Nov-05-2013 Continued To Nov-12-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Ronald M. Arlas, Esq., of Wright Finlay & Zak (415-230-4350) for Seterus, Inc.,Defendant and moving party.
No appearance by Plaintiff and opposing party.

Defendnat Seterus, Inc'S Demurrer To Complaint is Continued to November 12, 2013 Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C and provide courtesy copy of the operative complaint to Department 501 no later than November 6, 2013 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of the opposition no later than November 6, 2013 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Counsel's oral request to appear telephonically is granted. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
